task: Review the codebase and give a brief of the application state

key_learnings: MidpointX is a sovereign cloud-native gateway and reasoning agent operating on LangGraph with Firestore/Local persistence.
The test suite comprises 5 test suites (13 tests total) verifying A2A cryptographic verification, path scoping, sleep-cycle habit mining, and browser serialization.
All 13 tests passed successfully, indicating the codebase is robust and fully operational in the current environment.
The UI uses a modern, resizable three-column layout (Planner, ChatView, ReasoningTree) built in React and Vite.
outcomes.patterns_observed: The decoupling of state (LangGraph) from execution (MCP plugins/custom desktop controllers) provides excellent testability and safety boundaries.
